execution_target: local or EC2 ComfyUI API after model/input provisioning
execution_allowed_after: ControlNet Canny SDXL model is downloaded or synced and SHA256-recorded
control image is present in the active ComfyUI input directory
object_info proof confirms ControlNetLoader and ControlNetApplyAdvanced
model path/hash proof exists for checkpoint and ControlNet model
local or EC2 runtime gate allows generation

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic cinematic editorial portrait, natural skin texture, realistic eyes, detailed hair, edge-guided composition, coherent silhouette, soft directional light, lifelike lens rendering
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, plastic skin, waxy skin, distorted anatomy, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, edge artifacts
